label: Black-box export/import and context preservation probe
references: black-box runner draft; no upstream endorsement implied

scenarios.title: Cross-Tool Handoff
evidence: Synthetic export/import package with completed/open/constraint fields
gaps: Black-box export can preserve text, but explainable context selection is not verified.

gaps: The draft runner does not yet exercise receiving-model context limits.

scenarios.title: Feedback Pattern Capture
gaps: No reviewed writeback API is assumed for the black-box runner.
